description_long: This apple is round with a slightly irregular shape and a shallow dimple at the top where the stem would be. Its skin is predominantly a blend of pale yellow and red hues, with a gradient that deepens to a richer red on one side. The surface is smooth and semi-glossy, dotted with small, light lenticels. A noticeable dark bruise or blemish is present on one side, indicating some surface damage. The apple appears fresh but not pristine, with natural color variations and a firm, dense look. No stickers or labels are visible, and the apple is shown isolated against a plain background.
description: A round, red-yellow apple with a visible dark blemish and smooth, semi-glossy skin.
description_view_0: Front view shows a pale red-yellow apple with a small dark blemish.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a deeper red area and a large dark bruise.
description_view_2: Back view is mostly dark red with subtle yellow patches, bruise less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side is lighter yellow-red, blemishes less pronounced.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large dark bruise and small black spot
